title: Difference of Cubes
aria_label: a cubed minus b cubed equals, open parenthesis, a minus b, close parenthesis, times, open parenthesis, a squared plus a b plus b squared, close parenthesis
notes: Like the sum of cubes, use the SOAP mnemonic: Same, Opposite, Always Positive.
SOAP: Same sign as original (−), Opposite sign (+ab), Always Positive (+b²).
The trinomial factor (a² + ab + b²) does not factor further over the reals.
Identify a and b by taking the cube root of each term.
The only difference from sum of cubes is the sign of the linear factor and the middle term of the trinomial.
applications: Factoring cubic expressions that fit the difference-of-cubes pattern.
Simplifying rational expressions with cubic denominators.
Solving cubic equations of the form a³ = b³.

es.title: Diferencia de Cubos
notes: Como la suma de cubos, usa el mnemónico SOAP: Mismo, Opuesto, Siempre Positivo.
SOAP: Mismo signo (−), Signo Opuesto (+ab), Siempre Positivo (+b²).
El factor trinomio (a² + ab + b²) no se factoriza más sobre los reales.
Identifica a y b tomando la raíz cúbica de cada término.
La única diferencia con la suma de cubos es el signo del factor lineal y el término del medio.

ht.title: Diferans Kib
notes: Tankou sòm kib, itilize mnemotechnik SOAP: Menm, Opozit, Toujou Pozitif.
SOAP: Menm siy (−), Siy Opozit (+ab), Toujou Pozitif (+b²).
Faktè trinòm nan (a² + ab + b²) pa faktorizasyon plis sou reyèl.
Idantifye a ak b pa pran rasin kib chak tèm.
Sèl diferans ak sòm kib se siy faktè lineyè a ak tèm mitan trinòm nan.
